response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack web developer, but the role requires embedded networking security expertise that is almost entirely absent from this resume. There is no evidence of Linux kernel source-code work, network switch or L2/L3 protocol development, or security technologies like MACsec and 802.1X. Most critically, the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency, which the candidate does not list. C experience is limited to a brief 7-month stint over a decade ago, far from the strong UNIX C proficiency required.
strengths: Long, continuous software engineering career with senior/staff-level roles
Some low-level and systems exposure (C/C++ at National Instruments, low-latency DLang services, Linux)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed — a hard requirement for this role
No embedded networking, switch, kernel-modification, or security-protocol experience (MACsec, 802.1X, SNMP/NETCONF)
C proficiency is dated and brief; recent work is entirely web/full-stack TypeScript/Node.js

key_factors.factor: General seniority and systems programming exposure
